title: oenothera nealleyi
intro: Oenothera nealleyi, also known as the Big Bend evening primrose, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oenothera nealleyi include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or oil to create a topical treatment or tincture.
